name: GET_CURRENT_LANGUAGE
comment:
0 = american (en-US)
1 = french (fr-FR)
2 = german (de-DE)
3 = italian (it-IT)
4 = spanish (es-ES)
5 = brazilian (pt-BR)
6 = polish (pl-PL)
7 = russian (ru-RU)
8 = korean (ko-KR)
9 = chinesetrad (zh-TW)
10 = japanese (ja-JP)
11 = mexican (es-MX)
12 = chinesesimp (zh-CN)

name: _DOES_CURRENT_LANGUAGE_SUPPORT_CONDENSED_STYLE
comment:
Returns true if the current language is american, french, german, italian, spanish, brazilian or mexican.
_DOES_*
